issue_title: Ecobee Humidifier Not Listed Under Ecobee Integration
issue_body:
### The problem

The latest addition of humidifiers to the Ecobee integration adds a humidifier entity. However, the humidifier entity is listed as having been added/associated with the Humidifier Integration instead of the Ecobee Integration. Please see the attached images. 

### What is version of Home Assistant Core has the issue?

core-2021.5.0b7

### What was the last working version of Home Assistant Core?

_No response_

### What type of installation are you running?

Home Assistant OS

### Integration causing the issue

Ecobee

### Link to integration documentation on our website

https://www.home-assistant.io/integrations/ecobee/

### Example YAML snippet

_No response_

### Anything in the logs that might be useful for us?

_No response_

### Additional information

![Screen Shot 2021-05-03 at 5 55 48 PM](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/52541649/116938703-32c7cb80-ac39-11eb-8bc6-1f9272868965.jpg)
![Screen Shot 2021-05-03 at 5 55 02 PM](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/52541649/116938717-38251600-ac39-11eb-8d0f-f0df40c254d3.jpg)
![Screen Shot 2021-05-03 at 5 55 11 PM](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/52541649/116938729-3b200680-ac39-11eb-8fb9-78e1f9ec7763.jpg)
pr_title: Add Ecobee humidifier device_info and unique_id
pr_body:
The humidifier support in the ecobee integration did not
return device_info, causing the humidifier to not be associated
with the ecobee integration or the parent thermostat.
Added unique_id property

<!--
  You are amazing! Thanks for contributing to our project!
  Please, DO NOT DELETE ANY TEXT from this template! (unless instructed).
-->
## Proposed change
<!--
  Describe the big picture of your changes here to communicate to the
  maintainers why we should accept this pull request. If it fixes a bug
  or resolves a feature request, be sure to link to that issue in the
  additional information section.
-->

This change adds the device_info and unique_id properties to the ecobee humidifier support code. Without the device_info property the ecobee humidifier is not being linked in as an entity of the ecobee thermostat, and is not associated with the ecobee integration.
